findings.message: Production overworld candidate is below the compiler foundation's minimum review size.
RPG Maker map does not cite an intermediate terrain model.

evidence.note: WO-0024 Home Island overworld foundation. Canonical compact island hub replacing direct Ashford boundary jumps to prototype destination maps. Reference image: AtlasStudio/references/a_detailed_illustrated_game_design_map_poster_wo.png. Ashf

findings.message: Map027 foundation is explicitly retained as a negative example for WO-0025.
